prestazioni: Engine: Replace the original *Tipo 166* 2.0L V12 (1995cc, 140hp @ 6600rpm) with a fully rebuilt *Colombo 166* block bored to 2.5L (2493cc) using forged Mahle pistons (9.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from *Ferrari Classiche* for 180hp @ 7000rpm with a redline extended to 7800rpm via a *Weber 40 DCF3* triple-carburetor setup (replacing the original *Weber 36 IF4C*) with velocity stacks from *ITG* and a custom *Spiromax* fuel pressure regulator for optimized atomization.

Drivetrain: Install a *Hewland 5-speed dog-engagement transaxle* (replacing the original 4-speed) with a *Quaife ATB differential* and a *Tilton* twin-plate ceramic clutch, paired with a *Penske* adjustable limited-slip unit to handle the increased torque. Replace the original *Ferrari* driveshaft with a *GKN* carbon-fiber unit to reduce rotational mass.

Suspension & Braking: Convert to a *Öhlins TTX40* coilover system with 24-position adjustable damping, *Eibach* progressive-rate springs (600lb/in front, 450lb/in rear), and *SuperPro* polyurethane bushings for the *Ferrari 166 MM*’s tubular ladder chassis. Upgrade braking with *Brembo* 4-piston calipers (front) and *AP Racing* 2-piston calipers (rear) clamping *DBA 5000-series* rotors (330mm front, 300mm rear) with *Ferodo DS2500* pads and *Goodridge* braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Body: Replace the original aluminum body panels with *Zagato*-inspired hand-formed *Alcoa* 2024-T3 aluminum panels (0.8mm thickness) over a *Tube Investments* chromoly spaceframe, retaining the original *Touring Barchetta* silhouette but with a *Rocket Bunny*-style widebody conversion (2.5-inch flares front/rear) to accommodate the *OZ Racing Superleggera* 16x15 ET10 wheels (wrapped in *Pirelli P Zero Corsa* 205/55R16 front, 225/50R16 rear).

Aerodynamics: Install a *Voltex* Type-3 front splitter (carbon-Kevlar hybrid) with an integrated *AIM* pitot tube for real-time airspeed data, paired with a *Rear Wing Company* 3-element aluminum rear wing (adjustable 0-15° angle) mounted on *AeroCatch* quick-release mounts. Replace the original grille with a *Kamei* mesh unit (stainless steel, 3mm pitch) for improved airflow to the *Behr* aluminum radiator (dual-core, 42mm thickness).

Interior: Retrim the original *Connolly* leather seats with *Bridge of Weir* aniline leather (Cognac color) and *Alcantara* suede inserts, featuring *Sparco* 6-point harnesses (FIA 8853/98 spec) mounted to a *Schroth* bolt-in roll cage (TIG-welded 4130 chromoly, 1.75-inch diameter). Replace the original *Jaeger* gauges with a *Motec C127* digital dash (12-inch display) and a *Momo* *Mod.78* steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede-wrapped) on a *NRG* quick-release hub.
